parsed_output.justification: Eric explicitly admitted, 'I was a werewolf in the beginning,' which is a strong indicator of his alignment, even if he later attempted to deflect suspicion toward Paul and Mike. While Paul and Mike also made contradictory claims, Eric's admission is the most direct confession of being a Werewolf. Justin, who claimed the role of Insomniac and remained consistent throughout the discussion, ultimately decided to vote for Eric, making him the most likely target for Team Village.
